svg.title: Kinward Batch One representative interaction states
svg.desc: Static visual evidence for loading, error, neutral denial, focus, and confirmation states across Screens 2, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, and 10. Verified Batch One evidence; Milestone One coding authorized (D-18); non-medical foundation only; no runtime conformance claimed by this static board.
svg.text: Loading - error - neutral denial by screen; confirmations below - static design evidence only

svg.text: All visible controls are at least 48 px high. Focus examples use a 3 px violet ring with 2 px white separation. Static evidence only; no runtime conformance claim.
